history.content:
<thought>
Currently, I am facing right (`>`), and I can see that there are lava cells (`L`) directly ahead and to the sides. The goal is located at the top-right corner of the map. To avoid the lava and reach the goal, I should first turn left to face down (`v`) and then move forward until I am aligned with the top row where the goal is located.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Now that I have turned left, I am facing down (`^`). The next step is to move forward to align myself with the top row where the goal is located.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
After moving forward, I am still not aligned with the top row. I need to continue moving forward until I reach the top row where the goal is located.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I have moved forward again and am now at the top row but still not aligned properly. I need to turn right to face right and then move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now that I am facing to the right and on the top row, I can move forward to reach the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
